channel.title: Anthropic News
channel.description: Latest news and announcements from Anthropic

item.title: Anthropic co-founder Chris Olah's remarks on Pope Leo XIV's encyclical "Magnifica humanitas"
item.description: Anthropic co-founder Chris Olah's remarks on Pope Leo XIV's encyclical "Magnifica humanitas"

item.title: Anthropic appoints KiYoung Choi as Representative Director of Korea ahead of Seoul office opening
item.description: Anthropic appoints KiYoung Choi as Representative Director of Korea ahead of Seoul office opening

item.title: Anthropic opens Milan office to support Italian enterprise, research, and developers
item.description: Anthropic opens Milan office to support Italian enterprise, research, and developers

item.title: Anthropic raises $65B in Series H funding at $965B post-money valuation
item.description: Anthropic raises $65B in Series H funding at $965B post-money valuation

item.title: Anthropic confidentially submits draft S-1 to the SEC
item.description: Anthropic confidentially submits draft S-1 to the SEC

item.title: What we learned mapping a year’s worth of AI-enabled cyber threats
item.description: What we learned mapping a year’s worth of AI-enabled cyber threats

item.title: Introducing the Services Track and Partner Hub of the Claude Partner Network
item.description: Introducing the Services Track and Partner Hub of the Claude Partner Network

item.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8
item.description: An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consistency to handle long-running work.

item.title: Expanding Project Glasswing
item.description: We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries.

item.title: Anthropic co-founder Chris Olah's remarks on Pope Leo XIV's encyclical "Magnifica humanitas"
item.description: The full text of Chris Olah's remarks on the Pope's encyclical on AI.

item.title: Widening the conversation on frontier AI
item.description: Over the past several months, we’ve been organizing dialogues with groups whose work and traditions bear on the questions raised by AI.

item.title: An update on our election safeguards
item.description: We explain what we’re doing to ensure Claude plays a positive role in the US midterms and other major elections around the world this year.
